title: Anthony Albanese addresses the nation on the Middle East crisis – read the speech in full
summary_full: Prime minister says months ahead ‘may not be easy’ and urges Australians to ‘think of others in your community, in the bush and in critical industries’Australian PMs have addressed the nation only a handful of times. Anthony Albanese will join their ranksFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastMy fellow Australians.By nature, we’re an optimistic country.
